bta_bus_if
interface
bta_bus_if (input logic clk, input logic rst_n)
View source

Simple bus interface used by the driver and monitor to communicate with the DUT. Contains clock, reset, address, data, and control signals.

Variables
addr
logic [31:0] addr
View source

Address bus for memory-mapped transactions

data
logic [63:0] data
View source

Bidirectional data bus

wr_en
logic wr_en
View source

Write enable signal (1 = write, 0 = read)

valid
logic valid
View source

Transaction valid handshake signal

ready
logic ready
View source

Slave ready handshake signal
